name: Sentry for Open Source
description: Sentry provides free error tracking and performance monitoring for open-source projects with generous usage limits and no term limit.

perks.title: 5 Million Errors
perks.description: Track up to 5 million errors for free.

perks.title: 100 Million Transactions
perks.description: Performance monitoring with up to 100 million transactions.

perks.title: 10 GB Attachments
perks.description: Store up to 10 GB of error attachments.

perks.title: 100,000 Session Replays
perks.description: Replay user sessions to debug issues.

eligibility: Must be an active open-source project.
Project should use a recognized open-source license.
